text.title: Mobile UX Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: mobile checkout flow audit with vitals + touch-target findings.

example.title: Inventory
example.p: Screens: /cart → /shipping → /payment → /confirm. Primary action per screen: continue / pay-now / confirm.

example.title: Vitals
example.p: Lighthouse: LCP 2.1s, CLS 0.08, TTI 4.4s — vitals all pass.

example.title: Findings
example.p: 1) /payment button.pay-now is 36x36pt (threshold 44x44pt, ios) — fix: enlarge to 44x44 + 8px spacing from coupon link. 2) /shipping has two CTAs at equal weight (continue vs save-for-later) — fix: demote save-for-later to text link.

example.title: Output skeleton
example.p: Validated by scripts/validate-mobile-ux.py; passes schema; ready for owner review.
